title: hub.toml
description: Per-device project and workflow configuration for hub.

project.description: Codebases to observe on this device.
A codebase and its associated workflows and environments.

workflow.description: Codebase-level workflows (no deployment context). Use for PR review, issues, CI — things that belong to the repo rather than a running environment.

environment.description: Deployment environments for this project. Use when the codebase runs somewhere and you want to observe logs, errors, or runtime metrics per environment.
A deployment environment. Carries the platform context (GCP project, service name, etc.) shared by all workflows in this environment.

env.description: Environment name — e.g. dev, uat, val, prod.

gcp_project.description: GCP project ID. Required by GCP-based workflows (errors-gcp, user-activity-gcp, etc.).

gcp_region.description: GCP region — e.g. us-central1. Required by some GCP workflows.

service.description: Service or app name within the platform.

cluster.description: GKE cluster name. Required by GKE-based workflows.

workflow.description: A workflow instance. Add a schema to config/schemas/workflows/ and reference it here when implementing a new workflow.

monitor.description: Non-project observations not tied to any codebase — home server health, calendar, etc.
